/-!
# The `#find_syntax` command

The `#find_syntax` command takes as input a string `str` and retrieves from the environment
all the candidates for `syntax` terms that contain the string `str`.

It also makes a very crude effort at regenerating what the syntax looks like, by inspecting the
`ParserDescr`iptor of the corresponding parser.
-/

match  @  x  ,  @  x  with | .symbol s, acc | .nonReservedSymbol s _, acc | .unicodeSymbol s _ _, acc =>
     clear%  x  ;  clear%  x  ; acc.push s
  | .parser _, acc | .const _, acc | .cat _ _, acc =>
     clear%  x  ;  clear%  x  ; acc
  | .node _ _ descr, acc
  | .trailingNode _ _ _ descr, acc
  | .nodeWithAntiquot _ _ descr, acc
  | .unary _ descr, acc =>
     clear%  x  ;  clear%  x  ; extractSymbols descr acc
  | .binary _ l r, acc =>
     clear%  x  ;  clear%  x  ; extractSymbols r (extractSymbols l acc)
  | .sepBy p _ psep _, acc | .sepBy1 p _ psep _, acc =>
     clear%  x  ;  clear%  x  ; extractSymbols psep (extractSymbols p acc)

/--
`extractSymbols descr acc` takes as input a `ParserDescr`iptor `descr` and an accumulator array
`acc`. It accumulates all symbols in `descr` corresponding to `Lean.ParserDescr.symbol`,
`Lean.ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbol` or `Lean.ParserDescr.unicodeSymbol`.

The output array serves as a way of regenerating what the syntax tree of the input parser is.
-/
def extractSymbols : ParserDescr → Array String → Array String
  | .symbol s, acc | .nonReservedSymbol s _, acc | .unicodeSymbol s _ _, acc =>
    acc.push s
  | .parser _, acc | .const _, acc | .cat _ _, acc =>
    acc
  | .node _ _ descr, acc
  | .trailingNode _ _ _ descr, acc
  | .nodeWithAntiquot _ _ descr, acc
  | .unary _ descr, acc =>
    extractSymbols descr acc
  | .binary _ l r, acc =>
    extractSymbols r (extractSymbols l acc)
  | .sepBy p _ psep _, acc | .sepBy1 p _ psep _, acc =>
    extractSymbols psep (extractSymbols p acc)

/--
The `#find_syntax` command takes as input a string `str` and retrieves from the environment
all the candidates for `syntax` terms that contain the string `str`.

It also makes a very crude effort at regenerating what the syntax looks like:
this is supposed to be just indicative of what the syntax may look like, but there is no
guarantee or expectation of correctness.

The optional trailing `approx`, as in `#find_syntax "∘" approx`, is only intended to make tests
more stable: rather than outputting the exact count of the overall number of existing syntax
declarations, it returns its round-down to the previous multiple of 100.
-/
 @[  command_parser  1000  ]  public  meta  def  «command#find_syntax_Approx»  :  Lean.ParserDescr  :=  ParserDescr.node  `Mathlib.FindSyntax.«command#find_syntax_Approx»  1022  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.binary  `andthen  ParserDescr.symbol  "#find_syntax "  ParserDescr.const  `str  ParserDescr.unary  `optional  (    with_annotate_term & @  ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbol  )  " approx"  false

match  x._@.Mathlib.Tactic.FindSyntax.277181026._hygCtx._hyg.75  with  | (declName, cinfo)  =>  with_annotate_term  if prsr.contains cinfo.type && !declName.isInternal  then let descr ← unsafe evalConst ParserDescr declName
      let ls := extractSymbols descr #[]
      unless ls.isEmpty do
        symbs := symbs.insert (declName, ls.toList)
  -- From among the parsers in `symbs`, we extract the ones whose `symbols` contain the input `str`
   else  pure  PUnit.unit  if prsr.contains cinfo.type && !declName.isInternal  then  with_annotate_term let descr ← unsafe evalConst ParserDescr declName
       Bind.bind  (   unsafe evalConst ParserDescr declName
       :  ?  m  _  )  (    fun  (   descr  :  _  )  =>  with_annotate_term let ls := extractSymbols descr #[]

let match_results := ∅;
do
let r ←
  forIn symbs.toList match_results fun x r =>
      let match_results := r;
      match x with
      | (nm, ar) =>
        let rem := " _ ".intercalate ar;
        if
            (decide (2 ≤ (nm.toString.splitOn id.getString).length) || decide (2 ≤ (rem.splitOn id.getString).length)) =
              true then
          do
          let __do_lift ← findModuleOf? nm
          let __do_lift_1 ← getMainModule
          let mod : Name := __do_lift.getD __do_lift_1
          let match_results : Std.TreeMap Name (Array (Name × String)) Name.quickCmp :=
            match_results.insert mod ((Std.TreeMap.getD match_results mod #[]).push (nm, rem.trimAscii.copy))
          pure PUnit.unit
          pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
        else do
          pure PUnit.unit
          pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
let match_results : NameMap (Array (Name × String)) := r
let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=
  (Std.TreeMap.toArray match_results).qsort fun x1 x2 => x1.fst.lt x2.fst
let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=
  Array.map
    (fun x =>
      match x with
      | (mod, msgs) => (mod, msgs.qsort fun x1 x2 => x1.fst.lt x2.fst))
    sorted_results
let mods : List MessageData :=
  List.map
    (fun x =>
      match x with
      | (mod, msgs) =>
        toMessageData "In `" ++ toMessageData mod ++ toMessageData "`:" ++
          MessageData.nest 2
            (MessageData.joinSep
              (List.map
                (fun x =>
                  match x with
                  | (decl, patt) =>
                    toMessageData "\n" ++ toMessageData (MessageData.ofConstName decl) ++ toMessageData ": '" ++
                        toMessageData patt ++
                      toMessageData "'")
                msgs.toList)
              (toMessageData "")))
    sorted_results.toList
let uses : Nat :=
  (List.map
      (fun x =>
        match x with
        | (fst, msgs) => msgs.size)
      sorted_results.toList).sum
let numSymbs : String :=
  if d.isSome = true then toString "over " ++ toString (symbs.size / 100 * 100) else toString symbs.size
let head : MessageData :=
  toMessageData "Found " ++ toMessageData uses ++ toMessageData " use" ++
          toMessageData (if (uses == 1) = true then "" else "s") ++
        toMessageData " among " ++
      toMessageData numSymbs ++
    toMessageData " syntax declarations"
logInfo (head ++ toMessageData "\n" ++ MessageData.joinSep mods (toMessageData "\n\n"))

term.value:
let symbs := r✝;
let match_results := ∅;
do
let r ←
  forIn symbs.toList match_results fun x r =>
      let match_results := r;
      match x with
      | (nm, ar) =>
        let rem := " _ ".intercalate ar;
        if
            (decide (2 ≤ (nm.toString.splitOn id.getString).length) || decide (2 ≤ (rem.splitOn id.getString).length)) =
              true then
          do
          let __do_lift ← findModuleOf? nm
          let __do_lift_1 ← getMainModule
          let mod : Name := __do_lift.getD __do_lift_1
          let match_results : Std.TreeMap Name (Array (Name × String)) Name.quickCmp :=
            match_results.insert mod ((Std.TreeMap.getD match_results mod #[]).push (nm, rem.trimAscii.copy))
          pure PUnit.unit
          pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
        else do
          pure PUnit.unit
          pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
let match_results : NameMap (Array (Name × String)) := r
let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=
  (Std.TreeMap.toArray match_results).qsort fun x1 x2 => x1.fst.lt x2.fst
let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=
  Array.map
    (fun x =>
      match x with
      | (mod, msgs) => (mod, msgs.qsort fun x1 x2 => x1.fst.lt x2.fst))
    sorted_results
let mods : List MessageData :=
  List.map
    (fun x =>
      match x with
      | (mod, msgs) =>
        toMessageData "In `" ++ toMessageData mod ++ toMessageData "`:" ++
          MessageData.nest 2
            (MessageData.joinSep
              (List.map
                (fun x =>
                  match x with
                  | (decl, patt) =>
                    toMessageData "\n" ++ toMessageData (MessageData.ofConstName decl) ++ toMessageData ": '" ++
                        toMessageData patt ++
                      toMessageData "'")
                msgs.toList)
              (toMessageData "")))
    sorted_results.toList
let uses : Nat :=
  (List.map
      (fun x =>
        match x with
        | (fst, msgs) => msgs.size)
      sorted_results.toList).sum
let numSymbs : String :=
  if d.isSome = true then toString "over " ++ toString (symbs.size / 100 * 100) else toString symbs.size
let head : MessageData :=
  toMessageData "Found " ++ toMessageData uses ++ toMessageData " use" ++
          toMessageData (if (uses == 1) = true then "" else "s") ++
        toMessageData " among " ++
      toMessageData numSymbs ++
    toMessageData " syntax declarations"
logInfo (head ++ toMessageData "\n" ++ MessageData.joinSep mods (toMessageData "\n\n"))

term.value:
let symbs := r✝;
let match_results := ∅;
do
let r ←
  forIn symbs.toList match_results fun x r =>
      let match_results := r;
      match x with
      | (nm, ar) =>
        let rem := " _ ".intercalate ar;
        if
            (decide (2 ≤ (nm.toString.splitOn id.getString).length) || decide (2 ≤ (rem.splitOn id.getString).length)) =
              true then
          do
          let __do_lift ← findModuleOf? nm
          let __do_lift_1 ← getMainModule
          let mod : Name := __do_lift.getD __do_lift_1
          let match_results : Std.TreeMap Name (Array (Name × String)) Name.quickCmp :=
            match_results.insert mod ((Std.TreeMap.getD match_results mod #[]).push (nm, rem.trimAscii.copy))
          pure PUnit.unit
          pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
        else do
          pure PUnit.unit
          pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
let match_results : NameMap (Array (Name × String)) := r
let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=
  (Std.TreeMap.toArray match_results).qsort fun x1 x2 => x1.fst.lt x2.fst
let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=
  Array.map
    (fun x =>
      match x with
      | (mod, msgs) => (mod, msgs.qsort fun x1 x2 => x1.fst.lt x2.fst))
    sorted_results
let mods : List MessageData :=
  List.map
    (fun x =>
      match x with
      | (mod, msgs) =>
        toMessageData "In `" ++ toMessageData mod ++ toMessageData "`:" ++
          MessageData.nest 2
            (MessageData.joinSep
              (List.map
                (fun x =>
                  match x with
                  | (decl, patt) =>
                    toMessageData "\n" ++ toMessageData (MessageData.ofConstName decl) ++ toMessageData ": '" ++
                        toMessageData patt ++
                      toMessageData "'")
                msgs.toList)
              (toMessageData "")))
    sorted_results.toList
let uses : Nat :=
  (List.map
      (fun x =>
        match x with
        | (fst, msgs) => msgs.size)
      sorted_results.toList).sum
let numSymbs : String :=
  if d.isSome = true then toString "over " ++ toString (symbs.size / 100 * 100) else toString symbs.size
let head : MessageData :=
  toMessageData "Found " ++ toMessageData uses ++ toMessageData " use" ++
          toMessageData (if (uses == 1) = true then "" else "s") ++
        toMessageData " among " ++
      toMessageData numSymbs ++
    toMessageData " syntax declarations"
logInfo (head ++ toMessageData "\n" ++ MessageData.joinSep mods (toMessageData "\n\n"))

        let rem := " _ ".intercalate ar;
        if
            (decide (2 ≤ (nm.toString.splitOn id.getString).length) || decide (2 ≤ (rem.splitOn id.getString).length)) =
              true then
          do

          let __do_lift_1 ← getMainModule
          let mod : Name := __do_lift.getD __do_lift_1
          let match_results : Std.TreeMap Name (Array (Name × String)) Name.quickCmp :=
            match_results.insert mod ((Std.TreeMap.getD match_results mod #[]).push (nm, rem.trimAscii.copy))
          pure PUnit.unit
          pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
        else do

          pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)

          MessageData.nest 2
            (MessageData.joinSep

                    toMessageData "\n" ++ toMessageData (MessageData.ofConstName decl) ++ toMessageData ": '" ++
                        toMessageData patt ++

    sorted_results.toList

term.value:
fun r =>
  let symbs := r;
  let match_results := ∅;
  do
  let r ←
    forIn symbs.toList match_results fun x r =>
        let match_results := r;
        match x with
        | (nm, ar) =>
          let rem := " _ ".intercalate ar;
          if
              (decide (2 ≤ (nm.toString.splitOn id.getString).length) ||
                  decide (2 ≤ (rem.splitOn id.getString).length)) =
                true then
            do
            let __do_lift ← findModuleOf? nm
            let __do_lift_1 ← getMainModule
            let mod : Name := __do_lift.getD __do_lift_1
            let match_results : Std.TreeMap Name (Array (Name × String)) Name.quickCmp :=
              match_results.insert mod ((Std.TreeMap.getD match_results mod #[]).push (nm, rem.trimAscii.copy))
            pure PUnit.unit
            pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
          else do
            pure PUnit.unit
            pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
  let match_results : NameMap (Array (Name × String)) := r
  let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=
    (Std.TreeMap.toArray match_results).qsort fun x1 x2 => x1.fst.lt x2.fst
  let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=
    Array.map
      (fun x =>
        match x with
        | (mod, msgs) => (mod, msgs.qsort fun x1 x2 => x1.fst.lt x2.fst))
      sorted_results
  let mods : List MessageData :=
    List.map
      (fun x =>
        match x with
        | (mod, msgs) =>
          toMessageData "In `" ++ toMessageData mod ++ toMessageData "`:" ++
            MessageData.nest 2
              (MessageData.joinSep
                (List.map
                  (fun x =>
                    match x with
                    | (decl, patt) =>
                      toMessageData "\n" ++ toMessageData (MessageData.ofConstName decl) ++ toMessageData ": '" ++
                          toMessageData patt ++
                        toMessageData "'")
                  msgs.toList)
                (toMessageData "")))
      sorted_results.toList
  let uses : Nat :=
    (List.map
        (fun x =>
          match x with
          | (fst, msgs) => msgs.size)
        sorted_results.toList).sum
  let numSymbs : String :=
    if d.isSome = true then toString "over " ++ toString (symbs.size / 100 * 100) else toString symbs.size
  let head : MessageData :=
    toMessageData "Found " ++ toMessageData uses ++ toMessageData " use" ++
            toMessageData (if (uses == 1) = true then "" else "s") ++
          toMessageData " among " ++
        toMessageData numSymbs ++
      toMessageData " syntax declarations"
  logInfo (head ++ toMessageData "\n" ++ MessageData.joinSep mods (toMessageData "\n\n"))

term.value:
fun r =>
  let symbs := r;
  let match_results := ∅;
  do
  let r ←
    forIn symbs.toList match_results fun x r =>
        let match_results := r;
        match x with
        | (nm, ar) =>
          let rem := " _ ".intercalate ar;
          if
              (decide (2 ≤ (nm.toString.splitOn id.getString).length) ||
                  decide (2 ≤ (rem.splitOn id.getString).length)) =
                true then
            do
            let __do_lift ← findModuleOf? nm
            let __do_lift_1 ← getMainModule
            let mod : Name := __do_lift.getD __do_lift_1
            let match_results : Std.TreeMap Name (Array (Name × String)) Name.quickCmp :=
              match_results.insert mod ((Std.TreeMap.getD match_results mod #[]).push (nm, rem.trimAscii.copy))
            pure PUnit.unit
            pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
          else do
            pure PUnit.unit
            pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
  let match_results : NameMap (Array (Name × String)) := r
  let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=
    (Std.TreeMap.toArray match_results).qsort fun x1 x2 => x1.fst.lt x2.fst
  let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=
    Array.map
      (fun x =>
        match x with
        | (mod, msgs) => (mod, msgs.qsort fun x1 x2 => x1.fst.lt x2.fst))
      sorted_results
  let mods : List MessageData :=
    List.map
      (fun x =>
        match x with
        | (mod, msgs) =>
          toMessageData "In `" ++ toMessageData mod ++ toMessageData "`:" ++
            MessageData.nest 2
              (MessageData.joinSep
                (List.map
                  (fun x =>
                    match x with
                    | (decl, patt) =>
                      toMessageData "\n" ++ toMessageData (MessageData.ofConstName decl) ++ toMessageData ": '" ++
                          toMessageData patt ++
                        toMessageData "'")
                  msgs.toList)
                (toMessageData "")))
      sorted_results.toList
  let uses : Nat :=
    (List.map
        (fun x =>
          match x with
          | (fst, msgs) => msgs.size)
        sorted_results.toList).sum
  let numSymbs : String :=
    if d.isSome = true then toString "over " ++ toString (symbs.size / 100 * 100) else toString symbs.size
  let head : MessageData :=
    toMessageData "Found " ++ toMessageData uses ++ toMessageData " use" ++
            toMessageData (if (uses == 1) = true then "" else "s") ++
          toMessageData " among " ++
        toMessageData numSymbs ++
      toMessageData " syntax declarations"
  logInfo (head ++ toMessageData "\n" ++ MessageData.joinSep mods (toMessageData "\n\n"))

            pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
  let match_results : NameMap (Array (Name × String)) := r

fun __do_lift => do
  let r ←
    forIn __do_lift.constants symbs fun x r =>
        let symbs := r;
        match x with
        | (declName, cinfo) =>
          if (prsr.contains cinfo.type && !declName.isInternal) = true then do
            let descr ←
              «_aux_Mathlib_Tactic_FindSyntax___elabRules_Mathlib_FindSyntax_command#find_syntax_Approx_1».unsafe_impl_1
                  declName
            let ls : Array String := extractSymbols descr #[]
            if ls.isEmpty = true then do
                pure PUnit.unit
                pure (ForInStep.yield symbs)
              else
                let symbs := symbs.insert (declName, ls.toList);
                do
                pure PUnit.unit
                pure (ForInStep.yield symbs)
          else do
            pure PUnit.unit
            pure (ForInStep.yield symbs)
  let symbs : Std.HashSet (Name × List String) := r
  let match_results : NameMap (Array (Name × String)) := ∅
  let r ←
    forIn symbs.toList match_results fun x r =>
        let match_results := r;
        match x with
        | (nm, ar) =>
          let rem := " _ ".intercalate ar;
          if
              (decide (2 ≤ (nm.toString.splitOn id.getString).length) ||
                  decide (2 ≤ (rem.splitOn id.getString).length)) =
                true then
            do
            let __do_lift ← findModuleOf? nm
            let __do_lift_1 ← getMainModule
            let mod : Name := __do_lift.getD __do_lift_1
            let match_results : Std.TreeMap Name (Array (Name × String)) Name.quickCmp :=
              match_results.insert mod ((Std.TreeMap.getD match_results mod #[]).push (nm, rem.trimAscii.copy))
            pure PUnit.unit
            pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
          else do
            pure PUnit.unit
            pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
  let match_results : NameMap (Array (Name × String)) := r
  let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=
    (Std.TreeMap.toArray match_results).qsort fun x1 x2 => x1.fst.lt x2.fst
  let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=
    Array.map
      (fun x =>
        match x with
        | (mod, msgs) => (mod, msgs.qsort fun x1 x2 => x1.fst.lt x2.fst))
      sorted_results
  let mods : List MessageData :=
    List.map
      (fun x =>
        match x with
        | (mod, msgs) =>
          toMessageData "In `" ++ toMessageData mod ++ toMessageData "`:" ++
            MessageData.nest 2
              (MessageData.joinSep
                (List.map
                  (fun x =>
                    match x with
                    | (decl, patt) =>
                      toMessageData "\n" ++ toMessageData (MessageData.ofConstName decl) ++ toMessageData ": '" ++
                          toMessageData patt ++
                        toMessageData "'")
                  msgs.toList)
                (toMessageData "")))
      sorted_results.toList
  let uses : Nat :=
    (List.map
        (fun x =>
          match x with
          | (fst, msgs) => msgs.size)
        sorted_results.toList).sum
  let numSymbs : String :=
    if d.isSome = true then toString "over " ++ toString (symbs.size / 100 * 100) else toString symbs.size
  let head : MessageData :=
    toMessageData "Found " ++ toMessageData uses ++ toMessageData " use" ++
            toMessageData (if (uses == 1) = true then "" else "s") ++
          toMessageData " among " ++

let __do_lift ← getEnv

      let symbs := r;
      match x with

        if (prsr.contains cinfo.type && !declName.isInternal) = true then do
          let descr ←

                declName
          let ls : Array String := extractSymbols descr #[]
          if ls.isEmpty = true then do

              pure (ForInStep.yield symbs)
            else
              let symbs := symbs.insert (declName, ls.toList);
              do
              pure PUnit.unit
              pure (ForInStep.yield symbs)
        else do

          pure (ForInStep.yield symbs)

let match_results : NameMap (Array (Name × String)) := ∅
let r ←
  forIn symbs.toList match_results fun x r =>
      let match_results := r;
      match x with
      | (nm, ar) =>
        let rem := " _ ".intercalate ar;
        if

              true then

          let __do_lift_1 ← getMainModule
          let mod : Name := __do_lift.getD __do_lift_1
          let match_results : Std.TreeMap Name (Array (Name × String)) Name.quickCmp :=

          pure PUnit.unit
          pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
        else do
          pure PUnit.unit
          pure (ForInStep.yield match_results)
let match_results : NameMap (Array (Name × String)) := r
let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=

let sorted_results : Array (Name × Array (Name × String)) :=

      | (mod, msgs) => (mod, msgs.qsort fun x1 x2 => x1.fst.lt x2.fst))

        toMessageData "In `" ++ toMessageData mod ++ toMessageData "`:" ++
          MessageData.nest 2

do
  let prsr : Array Expr := #[.const ``ParserDescr [], .const ``TrailingParserDescr []]
  let mut symbs : Std.HashSet (Name × List String) := {}
  -- We scan the environment in search of "parsers" whose name is not internal and that
  -- contain some `symbol` information and we store them in `symbs`
  for (declName, cinfo) in (← getEnv).constants do
    if prsr.contains cinfo.type && !declName.isInternal then
      let descr ← unsafe evalConst ParserDescr declName
      let ls := extractSymbols descr #[]
      unless ls.isEmpty do
        symbs := symbs.insert (declName, ls.toList)
  -- From among the parsers in `symbs`, we extract the ones whose `symbols` contain the input `str`
  let mut match_results : NameMap (Array (Name × String)) := {}
  for (nm, ar) in symbs.toList do
    let rem : String := " _ ".intercalate ar
    -- If either the name of the parser or the regenerated syntax stub contains the input string,
    -- then we include an entry into the final message.
    if 2 ≤ (nm.toString.splitOn id.getString).length || 2 ≤ (rem.splitOn id.getString).length then
      let mod := (← findModuleOf? nm).getD (← getMainModule)
      match_results := match_results.insert mod <| (match_results.getD mod #[]).push
        (nm, rem.trimAscii.copy)
  -- We sort the messages to produce a more stable output.
  let sorted_results := match_results.toArray.qsort (·.1.lt ·.1)
  let sorted_results := sorted_results.map fun (mod, msgs) => (mod, msgs.qsort (·.1.lt ·.1))
  let mods := (sorted_results.toList).map fun (mod, msgs) =>
    m!"In `{mod}`:" ++ (MessageData.nest 2 <|
      m!"".joinSep <| msgs.toList.map fun (decl, patt) =>
        m!"\n{MessageData.ofConstName decl}: '{patt}'")
  let uses := (sorted_results.toList.map fun (_, msgs) => msgs.size).sum
  let numSymbs := if d.isSome then s!"over {(symbs.size / 100) * 100}" else s!"{symbs.size}"
  let head := m!"Found {uses} use{if uses == 1 then "" else "s"} \
                among {numSymbs} syntax declarations"
  logInfo <| head ++ m!"\n" ++ m!"\n\n".joinSep mods

all the candidates for `syntax` terms that contain the string `str`.

guarantee or expectation of correctness.

expanded.pp:
/--
The `#find_syntax` command takes as input a string `str` and retrieves from the environment
all the candidates for `syntax` terms that contain the string `str`.

It also makes a very crude effort at regenerating what the syntax looks like:
this is supposed to be just indicative of what the syntax may look like, but there is no
guarantee or expectation of correctness.

The optional trailing `approx`, as in `#find_syntax "∘" approx`, is only intended to make tests
more stable: rather than outputting the exact count of the overall number of existing syntax
declarations, it returns its round-down to the previous multiple of 100.
-/
 elab_rules  (  kind  :=  Mathlib.FindSyntax.«command#find_syntax_Approx»  )  : command  |  `(  #find_syntax   %  $  x  $ id $ d ?  )  => do
  let prsr : Array Expr := #[.const ``ParserDescr [], .const ``TrailingParserDescr []]
  let mut symbs : Std.HashSet (Name × List String) := {}
  -- We scan the environment in search of "parsers" whose name is not internal and that
  -- contain some `symbol` information and we store them in `symbs`
  for (declName, cinfo) in (← getEnv).constants do
    if prsr.contains cinfo.type && !declName.isInternal then
      let descr ← unsafe evalConst ParserDescr declName
      let ls := extractSymbols descr #[]
      unless ls.isEmpty do
        symbs := symbs.insert (declName, ls.toList)
  -- From among the parsers in `symbs`, we extract the ones whose `symbols` contain the input `str`
  let mut match_results : NameMap (Array (Name × String)) := {}
  for (nm, ar) in symbs.toList do
    let rem : String := " _ ".intercalate ar
    -- If either the name of the parser or the regenerated syntax stub contains the input string,
    -- then we include an entry into the final message.
    if 2 ≤ (nm.toString.splitOn id.getString).length || 2 ≤ (rem.splitOn id.getString).length then
      let mod := (← findModuleOf? nm).getD (← getMainModule)
      match_results := match_results.insert mod <| (match_results.getD mod #[]).push
        (nm, rem.trimAscii.copy)
  -- We sort the messages to produce a more stable output.
  let sorted_results := match_results.toArray.qsort (·.1.lt ·.1)
  let sorted_results := sorted_results.map fun (mod, msgs) => (mod, msgs.qsort (·.1.lt ·.1))
  let mods := (sorted_results.toList).map fun (mod, msgs) =>
    m!"In `{mod}`:" ++ (MessageData.nest 2 <|
      m!"".joinSep <| msgs.toList.map fun (decl, patt) =>
        m!"\n{MessageData.ofConstName decl}: '{patt}'")
  let uses := (sorted_results.toList.map fun (_, msgs) => msgs.size).sum
  let numSymbs := if d.isSome then s!"over {(symbs.size / 100) * 100}" else s!"{symbs.size}"
  let head := m!"Found {uses} use{if uses == 1 then "" else "s"} \
                among {numSymbs} syntax declarations"
  logInfo <| head ++ m!"\n" ++ m!"\n\n".joinSep mods
